action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 22 eval failed because predict.py was truncated/buggy and couldn't handle the stacked ensemble recursion (likely missing the 'clfs' key branch). The best confirmed test score is still 0.5606 from iteration 13 (domain ensemble). With ~30 min and 8 iterations left, I must first write a robust, complete predict.py that correctly handles all checkpoint formats (sklearn LR, list ensembles, dict with 'items', dict with 'clfs'/'bias', prototypes). Then I'll run a quick offline test on pre-extracted validation features to verify the recursion works, before spending time on a full eval.
